ingredients_text: Bolognese Sauce (54%) [Beef Mince (21%), Tomato Paste (6%) (Tomato Paste, Acidity Regulator (330)), Crushed Tomato (4%) (Contains Acidity Regulator (330)), Thickened Cream (Contains Milk, Thickener (1422), Emulsifier (472e), Vegetable Gums (415, 407)), Tomato Sauce (Contains Food Acid (260)), Pesto (Contains Cashews, Milk, Pine Nuts, Food Acid (330), Preservative (202), Thickener (415)), Broccoli, Water, Onion, Carrot, Red Cooking Wine (Contains Preservative (220), Milk), Brown Sugar, Beef Flavoured Stock (Contains Milk, Soybean, Flavour Enhancer (635), Colour (150d), Food Acid (330)), Crushed Garlic], Spaghetti (43%) [Durum Wheat Semolina], Parmesan Cheese (3%) [Contains Milk].
